brandPreferences.category: Swapping to the smaller pack of Starbucks Blonde Espresso Roast koffiebonen saves €25.58. Both are the same coffee, but the 1399 cent option is a smaller package, which fits the budget much better while covering your immediate needs.
Switching to the 389 cent pack of the same Campina Botergoud gezouten roomboter saves €10.47. It's the same product/brand—just a smaller or more value-oriented format.

Swapping your 583 cent Le Petit Moulin boerenbrood for the 203 cent variant (same type, cheaper format/package) saves €3.80 per loaf. This is a direct switch within the same product line for significant savings.
brandPreferences.preferred: Le Petit Moulin boerenbrood volkoren donker meergranen
brandPreferences.rejected: Le Petit Moulin boerenbrood volkoren donker meergranen

brandPreferences.category: Switches to a smaller Spa bruiswater mojito (EUR 1.85 instead of EUR 4.95). The flavor and function (sparkling water with mojito taste) is the same, just a smaller bottle, for EUR 3.10 savings per unit.

Swapping Dettol handzeep pomp (EUR 5.90) for Palmolive naturals amandel navulling handzeep (EUR 2.35) saves EUR 3.55 per pack. Both are reputable hand soap brands, but the Palmolive refill delivers similar gentle cleansing for much less -- a sensible budget tradeoff.

Substituting vegan gehakt (EUR 6.49) for Picnic varkensgehaktballetjes (EUR 2.89) saves EUR 3.60 per pack. Switching from plant-based to pork meatballs may not fit all dietary needs, but is the most affordable protein swap. If you strongly prefer vegan, consider removing this item instead.
